inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sar bhi dard kar raha hai

inputs.text: Mujhe sukhhi khaansi ho rahi hai, aur main thoda zyada thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Still a possibility, but cough suggests another condition

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, aur main wazan kam ho rahi hoon, khaansi bhi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription from previous PHC visit shown

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats, weight loss, and persistent cough are cardinal signs of tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely now, as symptoms suggest a more chronic condition

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but symptoms do not fully align with pneumonia

inputs.text: Mujhe ab bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur mujhe balgam mein khoon aaya hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Confirmation of tuberculosis, given the combination of symptoms and test results

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms and test results are not consistent with pneumonia
